notes.text: Cobb is exiled from normal life, unable to return home to his children.
The team takes on an inception job, raising the core idea-question: can an idea be planted reliably?
Cobb's internal arc centers on guilt, grief, and acceptance of Mal's loss.
The mission-trigger event escalates conflict across nested dream levels and time pressure.
The immediate event question closes as the team executes synchronized kicks and completes extraction/inception outcomes.
Character question closes as Cobb lets go of Mal's projection and chooses reality.
Idea question closes: inception appears successful as Fischer adopts the seeded belief.
Milieu question closes with Cobb returning home, though ambiguity lingers in the spinning top.
